overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a wet sidewalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. Neon signs and holographic billboards illuminate the street as vehicles pass by on the adjacent multi-lane road. The scene features the distinctive aesthetic of Cyberpunk 2077 with elevated highways and dense urban commercial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon signage

events.description: pedestrian in yellow pants walks toward camera and passes by on the left
group of three pedestrians approaches and passes by in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing neon signs

notable_agents.action: person in yellow pants walking toward camera then passing by on the left side

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with metal railings running parallel above the sidewalk
large vertical neon sign with bright red Japanese characters
green illuminated commercial sign with white text
metal railing separating sidewalk from the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a wet sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. Bright red and green neon signs illuminate the left side while a metal railing separates the path from the road on the right. A pedestrian in yellow pants and others walk toward the camera, passing by as the walk continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk section with digital advertising displays and street furniture

events.description: passing a tall vertical digital billboard displaying a figure in armor
speed limit sign indicating 40 becomes visible on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past digital advertisements and other pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in dark jacket walking in the same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall digital screen displaying a person in armor or cybernetic gear with orange accents
rectangular road sign mounted on a pole indicating speed limit of 40

segments.scene_description: The walk continues past the initial neon signs into a section featuring modern digital billboards. A vertical screen on the right displays advertising while pedestrians walk in both directions. The speed limit sign becomes visible as the camera moves forward, with the elevated highway structure now closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under overpass with large commercial billboards and reduced natural light

events.description: moving deeper under the overpass reduces ambient light and increases shadow coverage
dark vehicle with headlights on passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking under the shadow of the elevated highway with neon reflections visible on the wet pavement

entered.detail: massive horizontal billboard with teal lettering DR and text DECKER TANAKA & ROGERS
colorful horizontal advertisement showing food items and a character in red

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper under the elevated highway where the sky is mostly blocked. Large commercial billboards dominate the left side, including a prominent teal DR advertisement and a colorful food poster. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed as vehicles pass by on the right, their headlights cutting through the dusk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-slicked cyberpunk sidewalk that transitions from a brightly lit neon corridor into the deep shadows of an urban underpass. It begins beneath an elevated highway, moving past vibrant red and green neon signs while pedestrians in colorful attire pass by on the wet pavement. As the camera advances, the scene shifts toward a more modern commercial zone where vertical digital billboards and speed limit signs emerge along the roadside. The environment then grows increasingly enclosed as the camera moves deeper under the highway structure, where the sky vanishes and the lighting dims. Finally, the view is dominated by massive teal and multicolored advertisements on the left while the headlights of passing vehicles cut through the darkening dusk atmosphere on the right.
